These beautiful planters are built to last and promise to stay with your plants for more than 20 years without fading, chipping or losing their charm. The ceramic is skillfully baked and vitrified at 1200°C, giving it a stronger built and a longer-lasting life. The classic, evergreen designs of these planters gives your home a timless elegance and a wonderful charm. With an in-built drainage hole for adequate drainage, these versatile planters can also be used as pots and can be placed anywhere throughout your home. products.description: This classy and effective creation is just what you need to help your plants grow the healthiest with the perfect watering schedule! products.title: Gaillardia Seeds

Famosuly known as the blanket flower, these low growing hardy perennials love the full sun in a relatively dry well draining soil. products.title: Gomphrena Seeds

Used in borders, these aggresively flowering plants are a great addition to every garden with full sun.

products.title: Chrysanthemum Mix Seeds
products.description: Chrysanthemums are the most popular garden flowers. Chrysanthemum plants are relatively easy to cultivate and had medicinal uses as well. So your plant will give you multiple benefits like medicine, beautiful flowers and happiness of gardening.

products.title: Carnation Seeds
products.description: Historically symbolic of love, luck and affection, the new cultivars come in many colours. Give them 6-7 hours sunlight in a well-drained soil. Carnations make for excellent cut flowers. they are great for growing both in containers as well as outdoors, carnations are perennials that come back every year once trimmed after the blooming season.

care_tips: Give them 6-7 hours sunlight in a well-drained soil.

products.title: Dahlia Seeds
products.description: Dahlias are one of the most rewarding plants and once you grow a dahlia, you dont go back. With a seeminlgy endless supply of varieties, there is a dahlia for evey gardener. These sun-loving plants need full dun for 6-8 hours in a well draining soil. Grow them in containers or as borders in your garden, they will be the star in any show.

care_tips: These sun-loving plants need full dun for 6-8 hours in a well draining soil.

products.title: Balsam Mix Seeds
products.description: Also known as Spotted Snapweed, Balsam flowers are stunning heirloom flowers that bloom in the monsoon season in India. Native to India and Myanmar, these flowering plants are rather hardy and pest-resistant, making them wonderful additions to gardens nationwide, and worldwide! Balsam seeds are easily grown once you know and understand their individual needs. Additionally, their versatility and adaptability makes them ideal for both new and seasoned gardeners alike!

products.title: Alyssum Seeds
products.description: Alyssum is a species of flowering plants are members of the same family as mustard, native to Europe. They are called sweet alyssum because of the sweet, honey fragrance of the flowers. They are low growing, easy to grow plants bloom in clumps of white, pink, salmon, and purple coloured flowers. If you have a rock garden at home, this plant will go wonderfully in it.

products.title: Salvia Blue Seeds
products.description: Salvia blue is favoured in landscapes to introduce a false disheveled look through its lavender-blue flowers that run up and down its flower spikes, amongst the bright grey-green foliage. This flowering plant is generally grown from seeds and the plants are used to form an enigmatic sea of blue in gardens.

products.title: Poppy Mix Seeds
products.description: Poppies are your answer to those patches of sunny gardens where little else will grow. These large blooms with bright delicate almost paper like petals are perennial. poppies swaying in summer breeze is what completes any English cottage picture. These hardy plants are great for both fl;ower beds and containers and make for great cut flowers.

products.title: Aster Mix Seeds
products.description: Did you know that ‘Aster’ in Greek means ‘star’ and it is this meaning that brings the flower its name? The stunning Aster flowers are known for their starburst-like arrangement of bright petals that engulf vibrant yellow centers. When in full bloom, these flowering plants are an absolutely mesmerizing sight to behold. Aster flower seeds are easy to grow and understand, thus allowing them to do well in the gardens of new and experienced gardeners alike.

products.title: Dianthus Mix Seeds
products.description: Dianthus belongs to the same family as carnations and hence the 3 cm diameter flowers are made up of 5 petals with frilly ends and have various variegated and plain flowers in multiple colours such like red, pink, salmon, white and lavender. Dianthus is fragrant and perennial and rather popular among gardeners

products.title: Nasturtium Mix Seeds
products.description: Nasturtiums are not just pretty blooms that will make your garden smile, they are also a favourite of the culinary world. These annuals bloom from June to the winter months in shades of orange, yellow and reds. Their delicate fragrance, bright colors and wispy blooms make them a global favourite. Grow them in either containers or as ground cover.

products.title: Celosia Plumosa Seeds
products.description: Celosia Plumosa, or ‘Fresh Look’ Celosia has brightly coloured plumes, that look like a fire burning. The Celosia Plumosa is easy to grow from seeds and easy to care for. These plants are a fantastic if you want to introduce some variety to your garden. What’s better, they thrive in hot and sunny environment!

products.title: Gypsophila Seeds
products.description: World famous as the wispy dreamy "Baby's Breath", these darlings will turn your garden into a wonderland. A memeber of the carnation family, gypsphila flowers profusely with little intervention and can thrive with almost any other plant. Give it a sandy patch of land with partial shade that doesn't get too much wind to break its tiny blooms.

products.title: Celosia Cristata Seeds
products.description: Celosia Crisata is also called Cockscomb and has unique brightly coloured flowers that are velvety ripples spread out like a fan. This perennial plant belongs to the Amaranth family and is a classic for use in flower arrangements, either fresh or dried.

products.title: Coreopsis Seeds
products.description: Coreopsis is also called tickseed and you will be thrilled to know that it is an easy to grow, low maintenance flowering plant. It gets the name tickseed because the seeds of the coreopsis resemble ticks.The flowers look like daisies, with rugged frilly petal extremities and come in various bright and vibrant colours such as yellow, orange, pink and red.

products.title: Rudbeckia Seeds
products.description: Commonly as Black-eyed susan, Rudbeckias are famous for their bright daisy-like flowers, primarily in yellow. Depending on the weather conditions, they can be either annuals or perennials. Lovers of full sun, they grow very well in a well-draining but rich moist soil. Their true beauty shines through in patches growing in your garden.

care_tips: Lovers of full sun, they grow very well in a well-draining but rich moist soil.

products.title: Calendula Seeds
products.description: Botanically known as Calendula officinalis, belonging to family Asteraceae. This Southern European plant is also called Pot Marigold and it is one of the most commonly cultivated seasonal flowers for pot gardening. These easy to grow flowering annuals are popular for rich orange colour, mass effect, and long flowering period.

products.title: Ageratum Seeds
products.description: Often called Bluemink or Floss Flower, Ageratum is a wonderful and cozy-looking flower that is an absolute delight to grow from seeds. Ageratum seeds are easy to grow and very rewarding once they start to bloom. When growing Ageratum from seed, germination generally takes 8-10 days and you will begin to notice blooming 60-90 days after sowing the seeds. The flowers that grow are like fuzzy globes that give you the most wonderful aesthetics indoors and outdoors, creating stunning looks every time their flowering season comes around.

products.title: Mesembryanthemum Mix Seeds
products.description: A low-growing, spreading perennial famous for its long-lasting flower heads that close during the night and open with the sunlight.

care_tips: A low-growing, spreading perennial famous for its long-lasting flower heads that close during the night and open with the sunlight.

products.title: Pansy Mix Seeds
products.description: The Pansy is a hybrid variety derived from several other species and is famous for its large beautiful blooms in myriad beautiful colours. These easy to grow plants bloom from September to early May. This annual flowering plant is an excellent choice for both container gardening, as well as for ground cover in outdoor spaces.

products.title: Antirrhinum Seeds
products.description: Also known as Snapdragons, Antirrhinums are flowering plants that boast stunning blooms during the spring and fall months. These plants - undoubtedly - bring mesmerizing aesthetics to gardens but they are also known to be so much more than just pretty faces. The leaves and flowers of these plants have also been popularly used in traditional medicine for years, making them multifunctional all-rounders! Antirrhinum flower seeds are easily grown and with the right care, they will germinate within 10-21 days. Moreover, within 2.5-4 months of sowing the seeds, they will reward you with their gorgeous, long-lasting blooms!

products.title: Lupins Seeds
products.description: The lupins plant is great for your vegetable garden because it fixes nitrogen in the soil. The leaves grow in groups of 7 to 11 leaflets, each leaflet 2 and half inches long. The flowers are pea-shaped, in shades of purple, pink, blue and yellow. Lupins attract butterflies, especially the endangered special of butterfly called Karner Blue butterfly.

care_tips: The lupins plant is great for your vegetable garden because it fixes nitrogen in the soil.

products.title: Helichrysum Seeds
products.description: Rightly called the everlasting flower, the helichrysum loves a cooler climate to grow. Been grown over centuries both for it stunning blooms, as well medicinal properties, helichrysum is a hardy perennial with papery double blooms that last indefinitely. They are excellent cut flowers, which when properly dried can last forever in arrangements.

products.title: Stock Mix Seeds

Also called gillyflower, it has single or double fragrant blossoms that rise on sturdy stems from lush grayish-green foliage. It prefers a cool weather and is fit for growing in both flower beds and containers.

products.title: Amaranthus Mix Seeds

Often referred to as the Amaranthus Tricolor flower , this wonderful plant is easy to grow from seeds and relatively low maintenance upon attaining maturity. On an average, the Amaranthus Mixed Seeds take around 7-14 days to germinate and if being grown for culinary purposes, they are ready to harvest 25-28 days after being sown. With the right kind of love and care, these flowering plant mix seeds will mature into wonderful plants that will give you timeless looks and an authentic taste over time.

products.title: Star Phlox Mix Seeds
products.description: Star Phlox is also called Twinkle Star Phlox because of the peculiar star shaped, shaded flowers. They’re tiny, heavy bloomers that will add a definite star value to your garden.

products.title: Salvia Red Seeds

products.title: Clarkia Mix Seeds

products.title: Corn Flower Mix Seeds

products.title: Statice Mix Seeds

products.title: Aboli Pink Seeds

products.title: Phlox Seeds
products.description: Star Phlox is also called Twinkle Star Phlox because of the peculiar star shaped, shaded flowers. products.title: Gazania Mix Seeds

products.title: Home Compost Bin Kit - 20 Liter
products.description: Introducing the Ugaoo Home Compost Bin – Your Perfect Composting Solution! Are you ready to take a step towards a greener future? With its sleek design and innovative features, this compost bin is the ideal addition to any eco-conscious home. Key Features: Large Capacity: Our compost bin boasts a generous capacity, providing ample space to store all your kitchen scraps, including fruit and vegetable peels, coffee grounds, eggshells, and more. Say goodbye to frequent trips to the outdoor compost pile! Odor-Free Design: We understand that composting can sometimes lead to unpleasant odors in the kitchen. That's why our compost bin features a unique double-layered filter system, ensuring effective odor control and keeping your kitchen fresh and clean. Durable and Easy to Clean: Made from high-quality, BPA-free plastic, the GreenEarth Home Compost Bin is built to last. Its smooth interior surface prevents food particles from sticking, making cleaning a breeze. Simply rinse it with water and mild detergent, and it's ready for the next batch of compost. Secure Lid and Handle: The tightly sealed lid prevents any unwanted pests or insects from accessing your compost, while the sturdy handle allows for easy transportation when it's time to empty the bin. Stylish and Space-Saving: Our compost bin features a sleek and modern design that complements any kitchen decor. Its compact size ensures it won't take up too much counter space, making it perfect for small kitchens or apartments. Educational Composting Guide: To assist you on your composting journey, we provide a comprehensive guide with tips and instructions on how to create the perfect compost. Learn about the ideal ratio, how to troubleshoot common issues, and discover the joy of sustainable gardening. Make a positive impact on the environment while enriching your own garden with nutrient-rich compost. The Ugaoo Compost Bin is the perfect ally for eco-conscious individuals who value sustainability and want to reduce their carbon footprint.

products.title: Instagrow NPK 19:19:19 Fertilizer
products.description: Ugaoo InstaGrow 19:19:19 is a premium, water-soluble plant food designed to deliver balanced nutrition for healthy growth and vigorous foliage. With equal portions of Nitrogen (N), Phosphorus (P) and Potassium (K) in the 19:19:19 ratio, it ensures your indoor or outdoor plants get the right support at every growth stage. Whether you’re nurturing leafy greens, flowering plants or early fruiting crops, this all-round formula helps plants build strong shoots, develop deeper roots and flourish with vibrant leaves. Its fully soluble granules dissolve quickly, so you get even nutrient distribution and faster uptake without residue. Easy to use, Ugaoo InstaGrow 19:19:19 fits both foliar spray and fertigation methods: dissolve 2-3 g in 1 L of water and apply during active growth every 7-10 days.
